creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

It fetches fine both in my machine and in redports[1]

There's an additional "0.6" directory in your URLs that doesn't seem to be
in my original patch. Could you check that?

Also notice that on amd64 there seems to be a broken dependency[2]

Cheers

[1]
https://redports.org/~fernape/20130415165800-34447-114131/converseen-0.6.log
[2]
https://redports.org/~fernape/20130415165800-34447-114130/qt4-sqlite-plugin-4.8.4.log
